articles.title: Ceasefire with Iran ‘political disaster’ — Israel's main opposition leader slams Netanyahu
articles.description: Yair Lapid called it a ‘political disaster,’ saying that Netanyahu wasn't even ‘at the table’ when decisions were made for Israel. He also accused Netanyahu of failing to achieve the war's objectives.

topStories.title: J&K CM Omar Abdullah questions gains of U.S. in West Asia conflict after ceasefire deal

topStories.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 40 of US-Israeli attacks?
topStories.description: The US and Iran agree to a two-week truce, just an hour before Trump’s deadline to escalate the conflict expired.

topStories.title: Shehbaz Sharif’s ‘draft’ X post on Iran-US ceasefire goes viral; internet says ‘Looks he used AI’
topStories.description: A ‘draft’” version of a message on the Iran-US ceasefire was briefly posted on X before being edited, setting off a wave of online scrutiny.

topStories.title: As Trump Bullies NATO, Europeans Question Its Deferential Chief
topStories.description: NATO chief Mark Rutte navigates US-Iran war tensions and European divisions over alliance strategy

topStories.title: Iran war live: Trump announces truce, Tehran agrees safe transit in Hormuz
topStories.description: Iran has claimed victory and says upcoming talks in Pakistan do not mean the end of war is guaranteed.

topStories.title: Mojtaba Khamenei, Largely MIA, Helped Cut Truce Deal With US: Report
topStories.description: A defiant Iran and the most powerful nation in the world, the US, fighting for over a month, agreed to a ceasefire 90 minutes before Trump's "wiping out a whole civilization" threat was to end.

topStories.title: Israel issues new evacuation order for southern Lebanon, signals continued strikes despite ceasefire push
topStories.description: Israel’s military has issued fresh evacuation warnings to residents of Tyre in southern Lebanon, underscoring deep uncertainty over the scope of the proposed Iran-US ceasefire and raising fears that the parallel conflict with Hezbollah will continue unabated.

topStories.title: DMK’s KS Ravinchandran calls TVK a ‘toddler party’ at Pulinthope rally
topStories.description: Leaders and cadres from alliance partners, including the Congress, Makkal Needhi Maiam (MNM), and the CPI, were also present during the campaign.

topStories.title: ‘Bow down’: Iran posts provocative photo of Donald Trump kneeling before Persian king; Internet goes wild
topStories.description: The Iranian Embassy shared a provocative image of Trump kneeling before a Persian king, asserting Iran's historical significance amid tensions.

topStories.title: ‘Self-styled Vishwaguru exposed’: Congress targets PM Modi after Pakistan helps broker US-Iran ceasefire
topStories.description: The Congress party said “the self-styled Vishwaguru stands thoroughly exposed”, hours after Pakistan announced hosting talks between the US and Iran.

topStories.title: In Strait of Hormuz, Iran and China take aim at US dollar hegemony
topStories.description: Tehran and Beijing both stand to gain from boosting status of the Chinese yuan.

topStories.title: Strait of Hormuz reopens under Ceasefire, but 800+ ships remain stranded amid uncertainty
topStories.description: Shipowners are rushing to understand the fine print of a US-Iran ceasefire that could temporarily unblock the Strait of Hormuz and open an exit for more than 800 vessels trapped in the Persian Gulf.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the Day by Henry Ford: 'Whether you think you can or you think you can't — you're right'
dailyNews.description: Henry Ford, an American industrialist and founder of the Ford Motor Company, believed that belief does not magically create results, but it strongly shapes behaviour. He said, confidence does not replace skill, capital, or execution, but it influences whether those things ever get fully used.

dailyNews.title: Battleground Baramati: Ajit Pawar’s son faces criticism over ‘immature’ comments against Congress
dailyNews.description: Calling him an ‘ungrateful son’, a bad orator, Congress questioned his ‘political convenience’ and silence over his father’s accidental death

dailyNews.title: Will Iran levy Strait of Hormuz $2 million toll on tankers? Here's what we know
dailyNews.description: Buried inside the US-Iran ceasefire agreement is a little-noticed but potentially transformative financial arrangement - one that would see Iran charge every ship transiting the world's most critical oil chokepoint

dailyNews.title: SC hearing on Sabarimala women entry LIVE: Supreme Court to continue hearing of pleas today
dailyNews.description: Centre on Tuesday said that the issue of restriction on the entry of women aged between 10 and 50 years at the temple falls within the domain of religious faith

dailyNews.title: US ceasefire allows negotiations on Iran’s ‘workable’ 10-point plan
dailyNews.description: Donald Trump’s announcement of a two-week ceasefire paves the way for negotiations on Iran's 10-point plan.

dailyNews.title: ‘Golden age for middle east’: Trump celebrates ceasefire, vows US support in Hormuz buildup
dailyNews.description: A two-week ceasefire was established shortly before Trump's deadline to attack Iran. Trump claimed a complete victory and acknowledged Iran's 10-point proposal for negotiations. While Iran said that enemy suffered crishing defeat

dailyNews.title: Did Iran agree to end its nuclear enrichment as part of ceasefire? Here's why confusion still prevails
dailyNews.description: Iranian state media also said the 10-point plan for securing an end to the war would require Washington to accept its uranium enrichment program – a previous red line for the Trump administration

dailyNews.title: Is Lebanon part of US-Iran ceasefire? The Netanyahu vs Sharif fault line, explained
dailyNews.description: A ceasefire that was supposed to bring clarity has instead produced an immediate and pointed disagreement between two of its key players — with Pakistan insisting Lebanon is covered and Israel insisting it is not.

dailyNews.title: How Pakistan helped secure a fragile ceasefire between the US and Iran
dailyNews.description: Pakistan has a historic relationship with Iran, but an agreement was far from certain, writes the BBC’s Caroline Davies

dailyNews.title: Caution, relief as US politicians respond to Trump’s ceasefire with Iran
dailyNews.description: Democrats welcome the truce and call for accountability, as Republican hawks voice scepticism about talks with Tehran.

dailyNews.title: Iranians commemorate victims of Minab school strike
dailyNews.description: Iranians have commemorated the victims of the US strike on a girls school in Minab, that killed 168 people.

topStories.title: Silver rockets Rs 13,500/kg, gold gains Rs 3,700/10 gms as Iran war ceasefire lifts inflation worries. Right time to buy?
topStories.description: Gold and silver prices surged on Wednesday, mirroring global gains as U.S. President Trump's ceasefire with Iran eased inflation fears. MCX silver futures jumped 6%, while gold futures rose 2.4%. International spot gold hit a near three-week high. Experts advise caution amidst volatility, suggesting buying opportunities above key levels.

dailyNews.title: Pope Leo calls out Trump’s Iran rhetoric before last-minute ceasefire emerges
dailyNews.description: Pope Leo called President Trump's threat against Iran 'truly unacceptable,' urging world leaders to return to the negotiating table and reject war always.

dailyNews.title: Trump-backed Republican pads GOP's fragile House majority by winning showdown for MTG's former seat
dailyNews.description: Republican Clay Fuller wins Georgia's 14th Congressional District special election, reinforcing the GOP's slim 218-214 House majority for Speaker Johnson.

dailyNews.title: Biden wanted to drive reliable energy 'into a ditch,' says Trump Energy Secretary
dailyNews.description: Energy Secretary Chris Wright claimed Tuesday that the Biden administration was driving the U.S. energy system "into a ditch" through massive subsidies.

dailyNews.title: Trump agrees to 2-week ceasefire if Iran opens Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announces a two-week delay of a planned Iran strike following talks with Pakistani leaders and progress toward a potential agreement with Iran.

dailyNews.title: With Threat to Wipe Out Iran’s Civilization, Trump’s Rhetoric Goes Beyond Bluster
dailyNews.description: The president’s violent rhetoric risks damaging his credibility as a negotiator and the country’s standing in the world.

dailyNews.title: Trump Backs Down, but Questions Remain Over Iran and the Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Trump’s short-term intimidation may have worked, but the fundamental divides with Iran are as sharp as they were in February.

dailyNews.title: Hours Before News of Cease-Fire, Pope Leo XIV Issues Strong Rebuke of Trump
dailyNews.description: The first U.S.-born pontiff has consistently called for dialogue to resolve the war in the Middle East. He referred to Trump’s Iran threats as ‘truly unacceptable.’

dailyNews.title: To Boost Military Budget, Trump Targets Popular Programs at Home
dailyNews.description: Amid the war with Iran, the president has proposed to scale back some of the very programs meant to ease families’ financial burdens.

dailyNews.title: Only Trump Knows Why Bondi Was Fired as Attorney General, Blanche Says
dailyNews.description: In his first news conference since being elevated to acting attorney general, Todd Blanche said that “nobody has any idea” what led to Pam Bondi’s dismissal other than President Trump.

dailyNews.title: DOJ’s Civil Rights Division Investigates Cassidy Hutchinson, Who Testified Against Trump
dailyNews.description: It was a highly unusual move by Justice Department leadership to direct a case that appears to involve accusations of lying to Congress to a division that normally focuses on civil rights abuses.

dailyNews.title: ‘I Love Viktor’: Trump and Vance Cheer on Orban in Hungarian Race
dailyNews.description: The American leaders slathered on the praise for the nationalist standard-bearer just days before an election he could lose.

dailyNews.title: Democrat Wins Mayoral Race in Republican-Leaning Waukesha, Wis.
dailyNews.description: Alicia Halvensleben, the president of the city’s Common Council, defeated a Republican legislator, continuing a string of Trump-era mayoral wins for Democrats.
